summary: Iteration 62 - All 7 bug fixes verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features working as expected (time slots, skip dialog, budget grid, validation explanation).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 verified all 7 user-reported bugs: (1) CoursesPage TIME_SLOTS now uses 15-min increments (06:00, 06:15, 06:30... 21:00); (2) Skip button opens Dialog modal with skip-reason-input and confirm-skip-btn instead of window.prompt; (3) mark-paid endpoint adds client_name to transactions; (4) No 0 CHF SALAIRES COACHS - generate-salary-expenses filters 0 CHF, recurring-generate skips 0 CHF; (5) No test data patterns found in transactions; (6) Budget monthly grid returns valid category list with months data; (7) RecurringPage has validation-explanation div with explanation text.

Bug_2_SkipDialog.evidence: Skip button opens Dialog modal 'Skipper ce bilan' with data-testid='skip-reason-input' and data-testid='confirm-skip-btn'

Bug_3_MarkPaidClientName.evidence: POST /api/payments/{id}/mark-paid creates transaction with client_name field populated from member name

Bug_4_NoZeroSalary.evidence: No 0 CHF SALAIRES COACHS transactions found. generate-salary-expenses filters salary_by_coach for total>0. recurring-generate skips amount<=0

Bug_5_NoTestData.evidence: Checked all transactions - no TEST_, Dummy, Fake patterns found (Adrien Testa is allowed as real coach)

Bug_6_BudgetGrid.evidence: GET /api/transactions/monthly-grid?year=2026 returns list of 42 categories with months data and year_total. UI shows table correctly.

Bug_7_ValidationExplanation.evidence: RecurringPage has [data-testid='validation-explanation'] with text: 'Cette section vous permet de vérifier manuellement...'
